race.description: Ladbrokes Inter Dominion Trotting Champs Ht1 (L)
race.comment: SUSAN IS HER NAME (9) hasn't raced since she achieved what no other trotter has done, beating superstar Keayang Zahara in the Macarthur Mile at Menangle. That was in May last year and it is a test coming into this series off an extended break but she was readied with two trial wins and has a powerhouse stable and a touch of brilliance behind her. ROCKINWITHATTITUDE (3) landed another Group 1 when beating the mares in Sydney two back then missed narrowly at Melton last start. Strikes at 50 per cent at this circuit and distance, including the 2024 Great Square, and should get her chance from this draw. LONDON TO A BRICK (10) is another past Great Square winner and while he may need some luck from this draw he should be ready to peak after placing in his three Sydney outings off a spell. ARCEE PHOENIX (6) hasn't won since the final of this series last year but showed improvement to place when second-up at Melton last start and the return to Brisbane may spark his A-game.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 Ladbrokes QLD Constellations Carnival - Prize Money: $30,000
